cannot_detect: external drafts faster than the smoothing window
provides.description: Coarse ambient-temperature trend proxied from host thermal-zone maxima.
provides.fidelity: coarse: tracks the direction and rough magnitude of change in a smoothed internal-temperature signal; NOT a calibrated thermometer and cannot recover absolute ambient temperature (device heat is an unknown offset)
provides.name: ambient_temp

confidence.description: always low — this is a derived proxy
